backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing access‑controlled user profiles, product listings, order requests, and message threads with state stored in Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features to source files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend source file for reference.
frontend/index.css: Empty stylesheet placeholder for global frontend styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes, page components, layout, and theme provider for the React app.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Main layout with navigation, role‑aware menus, Internet Identity auth controls, and responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/OrderMessagesThr: UI component showing order messages with polling, message sending, and formatting.
frontend/src/components/OrderRequestForm: Form component that validates input and submits an order request for a listing, showing toast messages and redirecting on success.
frontend/src/components/ProfileOnboardin: Dialog prompting new users to create a profile, collecting basic details and saving them via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Internet Identity provider and hook handling authentication, identity loading, and login state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks wrapping backend actor methods for profiles, listings, and mutations with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light and dark theme color variables and base styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React, React Query, Internet Identity, and global styles.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with hero banner, feature cards, and navigation buttons leading to marketplace and profile pages.
frontend/src/pages/ListingDetailPage.tsx: Displays full listing details, farmer info, and purchase options with edit controls for the owner.
frontend/src/pages/ListingFormPage.tsx: Form for creating or editing listings, handling validation, prefill logic, and submission to backend mutations.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Marketplace view with search, filters, sorting, and paginated display of published listings.
frontend/src/pages/MyListingsPage.tsx: Dashboard for farmers to manage their listings, including publish, unpublish, edit, and delete actions.
frontend/src/pages/OrderDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed order info, determines buyer/farmer view, shows listing data, status, and a message thread.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Fetches and edits the signed‑in user's profile with form fields and validation.
frontend/src/pages/PurchasesPage.tsx: Shows the buyer's order requests with status, details, and links to order detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/SalesPage.tsx: Lists farmer order requests and provides buttons to accept or decline pending orders.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats bigint timestamps into relative or short date strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS config defining theme extensions, custom colors, animations, fonts, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file describing schema version, app summary, and a list of implemented features with IDs, titles, requirements, and versions.
